generated_oml:
instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A Living Lab building in the AECO domain serving as a physical asset for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle optimization through a unified virtual representation."
    base:contains OccupancySensor, LightingLevelSensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors configured within BIM models to capture occupancy data for adaptive control systems in BOREALIS"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors configured within BIM models to capture lighting levels for adaptive control systems in BOREALIS"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems (BCS) that adjust lighting levels based on DT control signals"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators within Building Control Systems (BCS) that adjust HVAC systems based on DT control signals"
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightingLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingLevelSensor
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data streams from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightingLevelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time lighting level data streams from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BCSRuntimeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Building Control System runtime data including sensor and actuator metadata"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSRuntimeDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance BCSRuntimeDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor, LightingLevelSensor
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for device connectivity and real-time data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimization, VisualComfortAdjustment, NonVisualHealthEffectAnalysis, Simulation
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for high-fidelity 3D visualization and interactive simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualization
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tools for automated BIM model transformations and deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables Simulation
]

instance GeometricBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric BIM model representing the physical structure of the Living Lab building"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTools, UnrealEngine5
]

instance SpatialBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Spatial BIM model defining spatial relationships and layouts"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTools, UnrealEngine5
]

instance FunctionalBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Functional BIM model capturing system functionalities and interactions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringTools, UnrealEngine5
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operational conditions using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing energy consumption through predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for adjusting visual comfort based on sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for analyzing non-visual health effects using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides NonVisualHealthEffectImprovementInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance Simulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for building performance analysis and control policy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance EnergyConsumptionOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization based on sensor data"
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort adjustments using sensor data"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for non-visual health effect improvements"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization insights for facility management"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation-based insights for iterative control policy optimization"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational monitoring data for facility management decisions"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of control signals (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC commands) from the DT to physical actuators via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional communication."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange for live monitoring and control."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized framework orchestrating BIM models, Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware for data exchange, Unreal Engine visualization, and modular service extensions for scalable DT operations."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases; the DT primarily covers the 'as operated' phase through real-time operational data integration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess interoperability and architectural soundness between the DT and physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, facilitating bidirectional communication between physical assets and the DT."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points for integrating with external systems (e.g., Building Management Systems, IoT platforms) through modular service-oriented architecture."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards for AECO domain modeling and the ODTE metric for evaluation; Eclipse Hono and Ditto are middleware tools, not standards themselves."
]
